roles.werewolfDesc: Wake up and see other werewolves
roles.seerDesc: Look at one player's card or two center cards
roles.robberDesc: Swap your card with another player's
roles.insomniacDesc: Check your card at the end of the night
roles.drunkDesc: Swap your card with a center card (blind)
roles.hunterDesc: If you die, your vote target dies too
roles.tannerDesc: You win if you get killed
roles.minionDesc: You see the werewolves, they don't see you

game.reasonNoWwKilled: No werewolf was killed. Werewolf team wins!

legal.aboutContent:
AI Werewolf: Midnight Hunt is a digital social deduction game inspired by the core gameplay of classic one-night werewolf tabletop games. Play against AI opponents in this fast-paced game of hidden roles and deception.

Built with modern web technologies, our goal is to bring the excitement of tabletop gaming to your browser — anytime, anywhere.
legal.aboutAiDisclosureContent:
AI Werewolf: Midnight Hunt uses Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro model to power its AI opponents. The AI generates in-game dialogue and strategic decision-making for non-player characters during gameplay sessions. All AI-generated content is limited to in-game interactions within the werewolf social deduction game context.

This platform provides a custom game interface built on top of Google's Gemini AI models. We are an independent service and are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Google or Google DeepMind.
legal.aboutDisclaimerContent: AI Werewolf: Midnight Hunt is an independent product. All references to third-party AI models and services are for informational purposes only. Google, Gemini, and related trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
legal.contactContent: For questions, feedback, or support, please reach out to us at yinshiwei0110@hotmail.com or via our GitHub repository.
legal.privacyIntro:
Effective Date: April 24, 2026

Your privacy matters to us. This Privacy Policy explains how AI Werewolf: Midnight Hunt ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, discloses, and protects your information when you use our website and game service (the "Service"). By using the Service, you consent to the practices described in this policy.
legal.privacyDataContent:
We collect the following categories of personal information:

• Account Information: When you sign in with Google, we receive and store your display name, email address, and profile photo to identify your account.
• Game Data: We store game statistics (wins, losses, roles played, rank progression) linked to your account.
• Payment Information: When you purchase game packs, payment is processed by our merchant of record, Creem. We do not directly collect or store credit card numbers or banking details.
• Usage Data: We may collect anonymized usage data such as pages visited, game sessions played, and feature interactions to improve the Service.
• Device Information: Basic device and browser information may be collected for compatibility and security purposes.
legal.privacyUsageContent:
Your data is used for the following purposes:

• Providing the Service: Authenticating your identity, tracking your game statistics, managing subscriptions, and personalizing your profile.
• AI Processing: Your in-game text inputs (chat messages, game actions) are sent to Google's Gemini API to generate AI opponent responses. These inputs are processed in real-time and are not stored by us beyond the game session.
• Service Improvement: Anonymized, aggregated data may be used to improve game balance, AI behavior, and user experience.
• Communication: We may use your email to send service-related notifications (e.g., account issues, policy updates). We do not send marketing emails without your consent.

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for their marketing purposes.
legal.privacyAiContent:
Our Service uses Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro model to generate AI opponent behavior. When you play a game:

• Your in-game chat messages and actions are sent to Google's Gemini API as prompts to generate AI responses.
• This data is processed according to Google's API data usage policies. We use the API in a manner where user prompts are not used to train Google's models.
• AI-generated responses are ephemeral — they are displayed in-game and are not permanently stored on our servers.
• We do not use your gameplay data to fine-tune or train any AI models.

For more information about how Google processes API data, please refer to Google's Cloud Data Processing terms.
legal.privacyThirdPartyContent:
We rely on the following third-party services, each governed by their own privacy policies:

• Firebase (Google): Authentication, database, and hosting infrastructure. See Google's Privacy Policy.
• Google Gemini API: AI model for generating game content. See Google's API Terms of Service.
• Creem: Payment processing as our merchant of record. See Creem's Privacy Policy at creem.io.

We encourage you to review the privacy policies of these third-party services.
legal.privacyCookiesContent: We use Firebase Authentication which sets cookies for session management and authentication state. Game preferences (such as language settings) may be stored in your browser's local storage. We do not use tracking cookies for advertising purposes.
legal.privacyRetentionContent: We retain your account and game data for as long as your account is active. If you request account deletion, we will remove your personal data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law. Anonymized, aggregated statistics may be retained indefinitely.
legal.privacyRightsContent:
Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights:

• Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
• Correction: Request correction of inaccurate personal data.
• Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data.
• Portability: Request your data in a portable format.
• Objection: Object to certain processing of your data.

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at yinshiwei0110@hotmail.com. We will respond within 30 days.
legal.privacySecurityContent: Your data is stored securely using Firebase/Google Cloud infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit. Access to user data is restricted by authentication rules and role-based access controls. While we implement industry-standard security measures, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
legal.privacyContactContent: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at yinshiwei0110@hotmail.com. We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via the Service or email. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
legal.termsIntro:
Effective Date: April 24, 2026

Please read these Terms of Service ("Terms") carefully before using AI Werewolf: Midnight Hunt (the "Service"), operated by AI Werewolf ("we", "us", or "our"). By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
legal.termsServiceContent: AI Werewolf: Midnight Hunt is provided as-is for entertainment purposes. The Service is a web-based social deduction game featuring AI-powered opponents. You must be at least 13 years of age to use the Service. You must not abuse the service, attempt to exploit the AI system, reverse-engineer the game logic, or use automated tools (bots, scrapers, etc.) to interact with the game.
legal.termsAiContent:
This Service uses Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro model to power AI game opponents. The AI generates in-game dialogue and strategic behavior for non-player characters.

• AI Disclosure: Our platform provides a custom game interface built on top of Google's Gemini AI models. We are an independent service and are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Google or Google DeepMind.
• AI Limitations: AI-generated content may occasionally be inaccurate, inconsistent, or unexpected. We do not guarantee the quality or accuracy of AI-generated game dialogue.
• Model Changes: We reserve the right to change the underlying AI model at any time to improve the Service.
legal.termsAcceptableUseContent:
You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. The following activities are strictly prohibited:

• Generating, attempting to generate, or soliciting NSFW, sexually explicit, pornographic, or sexually suggestive content of any kind through interactions with the AI.
• Generating content that depicts violence against real individuals, hate speech, harassment, or discrimination.
• Attempting to manipulate AI opponents into producing harmful, illegal, abusive, or inappropriate content through prompt injection or other techniques.
• Using the Service to generate deepfakes, impersonate real individuals, or create misleading content.
• Attempting to bypass content safety measures or moderation systems.
• Using the Service in any manner that violates applicable local, state, national, or international law.

Violation of this Acceptable Use Policy may result in immediate termination of your account without refund.
legal.termsProhibitedContentContent:
The following types of content are explicitly prohibited on our platform:

• Sexually explicit or NSFW content, including AI-generated sexual content.
• Content depicting minors in any harmful or inappropriate context.
• Content that promotes terrorism, extremism, or violence.
• Content that infringes on intellectual property rights of third parties.
• Malware, phishing attempts, or any other malicious content.
• Content designed to harass, bully, or threaten individuals.

We reserve the right to terminate accounts that violate these prohibitions without prior notice.
legal.termsAccountContent:
Free accounts receive a limited number of games. Paid packs grant additional games as described on the pricing page. Payments are processed through Creem, our merchant of record. Creem handles all billing, tax collection, and refund processing.

• Pricing: All prices are displayed on the Service and include applicable taxes where required by law.
• Refunds: Refund requests are subject to Creem's refund policy. Contact yinshiwei0110@hotmail.com for billing inquiries.
• Account Security: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
legal.termsContentContent:
While the game is primarily single-player against AI, you agree to:

• Not misuse the Service in any way that could harm the platform, its infrastructure, or other users.
• Not attempt to access other users' accounts or data.
• Not interfere with or disrupt the Service or its connected networks.
• Comply with all applicable laws and regulations while using the Service.
legal.termsIpContent:
All content, design, code, graphics, and other materials on the Service are owned by or licensed to AI Werewolf and are protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works from any part of the Service without our prior written consent.

AI-generated in-game dialogue is provided for personal, non-commercial entertainment only. You do not acquire any intellectual property rights in AI-generated game content.
legal.termsLiabilityContent:
To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, AI Werewolf shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability for any claims arising from the Service shall not exceed the amount you have paid to us in the 12 months preceding the claim.

The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied.
legal.termsDisputeContent: Any disputes arising from these Terms or the Service shall first be attempted to be resolved through good-faith negotiation by contacting yinshiwei0110@hotmail.com. If a resolution cannot be reached within 30 days, either party may pursue remedies available under applicable law.
legal.termsChangesContent: We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via the Service or email. Your continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. If you do not agree with the changes, you must discontinue using the Service.

checkout.successDesc: Thank you for your purchase! Your premium access is now active.
